app.name: Ebbing House
app.tagline: Learn smart. Repeat right. Stay consistent.
app.welcome: Ready to build your memory momentum?

branding.sidebar_note: Retro memory lab, modern learning rhythm.
branding.dashboard_note: An 8-bit inspired identity for a calm daily memory practice.
branding.support_badge: Built with care, iteration, and memory science.

dashboard.title: Today's Focus
dashboard.subtitle: Small daily reviews compound into long-term mastery.
dashboard.active_card_none_status: Create or select a profile to personalize review priorities.
dashboard.active_card_new_status: No tracked questions yet. Start with a due or practice session.
dashboard.due_card_no_profile: Select an active learner to compute due reviews.
dashboard.due_card_all_caught_up: All caught up for now. Great consistency.

encouragement.no_profile: Choose an active learner profile to unlock a personalized daily plan.
encouragement.fresh_start: First reviews build momentum quickly. Start with a short focused session.
encouragement.caught_up_today: Excellent work today. Your due queue is clear right now.
encouragement.all_caught_up: No due reviews currently. A short practice session can still reinforce memory.
encouragement.light_queue: Light queue today. Clearing it now will protect retention.
encouragement.regular_queue: Steady review load today. A focused session will keep progress stable.
encouragement.heavy_queue: Priority day: tackle the due queue in small blocks and keep momentum.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Create learner profiles for students, family members, or classes.

memory_garden.title: Memory Garden
memory_garden.description: A calm visual map of your learning growth, shaped by real review progress.

import_csv.title: Import CSV
import_csv.description: Bring in MCQ decks from CSV and validate question quality before study.

review.title: Review Session
review.description: Run spaced-repetition sessions with clear feedback and score tracking.

hangman.title: Hangman Challenge
hangman.description: Answer quiz questions to keep the character safe. Wrong answers increase danger.

connect4.title: Shoot 4 Challenge
connect4.description: Correct answers power your moves. Wrong answers give the opponent an extra turn.

maze.title: Maze Challenge
maze.description: Choose a direction, answer correctly, and progress through the maze to the exit.

history.title: Recent Runs
history.description: A compact personal history of completed mini-game sessions.

trophies.title: Trophies & Badges
trophies.description: Celebrate consistency, milestones, and mastery levels.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize language, theme, and learning preferences.

support.title: Support the project
support.description: Help us build more educational mini-games and better learning tools.

decks.title: Deck Management
decks.description: Create, edit, and safely delete decks used across all learning modes.

questions.title: Question Management
questions.description: Create, edit, and delete questions for the selected deck.

support_flow.amount_note: The amount is fully flexible on the payment page.

mood.no_profile: Choose a learner profile and your garden will awaken.

help.title: CSV format help
help.description: Use this quick guide to prepare your file before validation and import.
help.conventions: Modes: {mode_single} or {mode_multiple}. In {mode_single}, select exactly one correct answer; in {mode_multiple}, select one or more. Use '{separator}' in correct_answers (example: A{separator}C). Required columns: {required_fields}. choice_c and choice_d are optional.

fields.question: Question prompt text. Must not be empty.
fields.correct_answers: Correct letters (A-D). Canonical separator: '|', for example A|C.
fields.mode: Question mode. Use single_choice or multiple_choice (if empty, mode is inferred from correct_answers).
fields.explanation: Optional explanation shown after answer validation.
fields.difficulty: Optional difficulty from 1 to 5 (out-of-range values are clamped).

help.minimal_example:
id,category,question,choice_a,choice_b,choice_c,choice_d,correct_answers,mode,explanation,difficulty,tags
demo_001,general,Which option is a vowel?,A,E,,,B,single_choice,E is a vowel.,1,starter

maze_flow.helper_text: Rule: wall directions are blocked immediately; traversable directions require one correct answer to move. The guardian patrols nearby and catches trigger an automatic restart.

maze_flow.session_lost: Challenge ended before reaching the exit.

maze_flow.no_decks: No deck available. Create/import a deck first.
maze_flow.distance_idle: Distance to exit appears after start.
maze_flow.guardian_idle: Guardian idle: start a run to activate patrol.

maze_flow.feedback_guardian_caught_restart: Caught by the guardian. Maze restarted. (Restarts: {count})
maze_flow.difficulty_hint_easy: Easy: smaller maze, slower guardian, calmer patrol.
maze_flow.difficulty_hint_normal: Normal: balanced maze size and guardian pressure.
maze_flow.difficulty_hint_hard: Hard: larger maze, faster guardian, wider patrol radius.
maze_flow.difficulty_deck_hint: Recommended: use a deck with enough questions for longer paths.
maze_flow.error_runtime: The challenge action could not be completed. Please try again.
